{
  "cefr_level": "A2",
  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,
    "flesch_kincaid": null,
    "rule_notes": "Holistic assessment: basic vocabulary range ('tips', 'apps', 'calendars', 'energy'), simple sentence structures, frequent elementary errors in subject-verb agreement, demonstratives, prepositions, and spelling. Errors are characteristic of A2 level. Borderline A2/B1 but chose lower level per reliability rule."
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
  "communicative_task_notes": [
    "Addresses the Telegram post appropriately with a helpful, peer-to-peer tone.",
    "Provides three relevant tips on organizing time (apps/calendars, limiting social media, sleep/food).",
    "Sentence count meets the 10-sentence requirement (approximately 10-11 sentences including numbered items)."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.58,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A1; Medium)",
    "at Play Market -> on Play Market (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "spend a lot of time to TV -> spend a lot of time on TV (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "write me at personal messages -> message me privately / write to me in private messages (Lexis; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "simular", "correction": "similar", "comment": "Spelling error; phonetic confusion.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "leave from useless groups", "correction": "leave useless groups", "comment": "Unnecessary preposition 'from' after 'leave'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "enought", "correction": "enough", "comment": "Spelling error.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "write me at personal messages", "correction": "message me privately", "comment": "L1 calque; unnatural phrasing for private/direct messages.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {"excerpt": "Here is the tips", "correction": "Here are the tips", "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error; 'tips' is plural.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "this apps", "correction": "these apps", "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun error; 'apps' is plural.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "at Play Market", "correction": "on Play Market", "comment": "Preposition error; platforms use 'on'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV", "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV", "comment": "Preposition error; 'spend time on' is the correct collocation.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "at VK", "correction": "on VK", "comment": "Preposition error; social media platforms use 'on'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "I hope, my tips", "correction": "I hope my tips", "comment": "Unnecessary comma after 'hope'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {"excerpt": "i", "correction": "I", "comment": "Lowercase 'i' is inappropriate; first-person pronoun must be capitalized.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"}
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "Manage your time", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Good B1-level collocation attempt; appropriate advice vocabulary."},
  ],
    {"item": "You should leave...", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Grammar", "note": "Correct use of modal 'should' for advice; B1 structure."},
    {"item": "It will bring you enough energy", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Attempt at cause-effect expression with 'bring you energy'; B1 range despite spelling error."}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level: A2. The text communicates practical advice in a clear, peer-appropriate tone. However, the writing shows characteristic A2-level difficulties: frequent errors in basic grammar (subject-verb agreement with 'Here is the tips', demonstrative pronoun 'this apps'), preposition choices ('time to TV', 'at Play Market'), and spelling ('simular', 'enought'). The numbered list structure is a good organizational attempt. Strengths include correct use of modal 'should' and vocabulary like 'manage your time', which show B1 ambition, but control is not yet consistent enough to upgrade.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice subject-verb agreement with plural subjects (e.g., 'Here are some tips', 'These apps help').",
    "Review common preposition collocations: 'spend time ON something', 'ON social media platforms', 'ON Play Market'.",
    "Focus on spelling of high-frequency words: 'similar', 'enough', and always capitalize 'I'."
  ]
}

      {"excerpt": "fully free weekends", "correction": "completely free weekends", "comment": "'Fully free' is an awkward collocation; 'completely free' is more natural.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B2"}

      {"excerpt": "options how to organize", "correction": "options on how to organize / options for organizing", "comment": "Missing preposition; 'options for + -ing' or 'options on how to + verb' required.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "each my day gets easier", "correction": "each of my days gets easier", "comment": "'Each my day' is incorrect; requires 'each of my days' or rephrase.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "other's works", "correction": "others' works", "comment": "Plural possessive needed: 'others'' (works belonging to other people).", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "But very important thing", "correction": "But a very important thing", "comment": "Missing indefinite article before singular countable noun.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "Firstly I want", "correction": "Firstly, I want", "comment": "Comma typically follows sentence-initial adverbs like 'Firstly'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],

  },

    {"item": "abuse this help", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Ambitious vocabulary choice; slightly unusual in this context but shows range."},
    {"item": "assignments", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Appropriate academic vocabulary for the context."},
    {"item": "Actually, I think... / However, you shouldn't... / Firstly I want... / For example, I like... / Also, though you shouldn't...", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Discourse marker", "note": "Good variety and appropriate use of discourse markers to structure the response."}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level: B1. The text demonstrates solid B1 proficiency with appropriate vocabulary (resources, overload, assignments) and good use of discourse markers (Actually, However, Firstly, For example, Also). Grammar shows control of basic structures but recurring issues with prepositions (tips how → tips on how), articles (very important thing → a very important thing), and possessives (other's → others'). The spelling error 'decition' is minor. Communicative task is fully achieved with relevant, well-organized advice. Strengths above B1 include B2 vocabulary (overload, abuse) and confident use of varied discourse markers.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice preposition + gerund patterns (tips on doing, options for organizing) to reduce preposition omissions.",
    "Review article usage with singular countable nouns, especially in sentence-initial position.",
    "Focus on plural possessive formation (others' vs other's) to improve accuracy in written work."
  ]
}
